calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-02-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Oscar Gonzalez, Appellant/Cross Defendant/Plaintiff, appears in pro per.
Pete Chilicas, Respondent/Cross Complainant/Defendant, appears in pro per, with witness, Carol Woodall.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Oscar Gonzalez, Appellant/Cross Defendant/Plaintiff, testifies on his own behalf.

Ms. Woodall testifies on behalf of Pete Chilicas, Respondent/Cross Complainant/Defendant.

Pete Chilicas, Respondent/Cross Complainant/Defendant, testifies on his own behalf.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. All exhibits are returned to the respective parties.

Judge Garrett L. Wong, Clerk Vicki Mack, Not Reported (Dept. 608)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2015 Set For Trial On Jul-02-15 At 09:50 A.M. In Dept 608

Off Calendar Jul-02-2015 Continued To Jul-02-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
